title: Keryx Child Model Selection
description: Optional `model` block added to subagent-dispatch (the agent-definition surface) and the resolved `modelSelection` field stamped on the harness ChildContractExtension. Omitted request => inherit parent verbatim.

modelRequest.title: Dispatch model request
modelRequest.description: What the orchestrator asks for. Omit the whole block to inherit the parent orchestrator's provider/model. `provider`/`model` present => explicit lateral selection. `tier` present => resolve through the configured tier map. `provider`+`model` and `tier` are mutually exclusive.

inherit.description: Explicit inherit marker (equivalent to omitting the block). If true, provider/model/tier are ignored.

resolvedSelection.title: Resolved model selection
resolvedSelection.description: Concrete, gated result stamped on ChildContractExtension after resolveChildModel succeeds (gates G1 allowlist, G2 trust/network, G3 classifiable all passed).

source.description: Which rung of the resolution order produced this selection.
